subject: Larvesta, a white larva-like Pokemon with five orange horn-like projections on its head, resting among orange flowers
description: A round white larva-like creature sits nestled among warm orange flowers, its body soft and segmented. Five prominent orange horn-like protrusions radiate from its head, each tipped with flame-orange coloring. The surrounding environment is a field of vivid orange blooms — roses or similar flowers — that complement the creature's warm coloring and give the scene a cozy, sunlit meadow feel. The sky above is pale blue with light cloud. The mood is peaceful and warm despite the creature's fire-type nature, emphasizing its origin lore of nesting on the sun.
foreground: Larvesta sitting among orange flowers, white body with orange horn projections
background: orange flower field, pale blue sky with light clouds
